_comment: IFR full departure flow: Delivery clearance (ATIS check) → readback → taxi → holding point → Tower line-up-and-wait → cleared for takeoff → freq handoff → Departure initial contact. Pins the complete IFR Slice 1+2 ground flow at LSZH (has Delivery + Ground + Tower + Departure).
name: IFR departure — LSZH (Delivery → Ground → Tower → Departure)

say.note: 1 — Delivery: IFR clearance WITHOUT ATIS mention — must be refused
say.text: Zurich Delivery November One One Romeo Charlie request IFR clearance to LFMN

say.note: 2 — Delivery: IFR clearance WITH information Alpha — must be issued
say.text: Zurich Delivery November One One Romeo Charlie request IFR clearance to LFMN information Alpha

say.note: 3 — Delivery: full readback — startup approved with Ground handoff
say.text: November One One Romeo Charlie cleared to destination as filed initial climb five thousand feet squawk one seven two four QNH one zero one three information Alpha

say.note: 4 — Ground: request taxi (NOT misclassified as RUNWAY_VACATED)
say.text: Zurich Ground November One One Romeo Charlie request taxi runway two eight left
November One One Romeo Charlie taxi holding point runway two eight left via Alpha

say.note: 6 — Ground: at holding point — must issue Tower contact with frequency
say.text: Zurich Ground November One One Romeo Charlie holding short runway two eight left

say.note: 7 — Tower: holding short — must issue line up and wait
say.text: Zurich Tower November One One Romeo Charlie holding short runway two eight left

say.note: 8 — Tower: ready for departure — must issue takeoff clearance
say.text: November One One Romeo Charlie ready for departure

say.note: 9 — Tower: readback takeoff clearance → Tower issues Departure freq handoff
say.text: November One One Romeo Charlie runway two eight left cleared for takeoff

say.note: 10 — Tower: pilot reads back Departure frequency and signs off
say.text: 122.675, November One One Romeo Charlie, good day

say.note: 11 — Departure: initial call — radar contact, now in RADAR_CONTACT for SID climb management
say.text: Zurich Departure November One One Romeo Charlie passing two thousand feet climbing to five thousand feet
